config.script:
#include "50200" 'qxx_publication #include "50217" 'realize publication #include "50518" 'MessageBoxAndForget #include "50122"
class cn5realprod_oper_config public m_strName public m_cCreateTask public m_cRealize public m_cCollector
public m_idObjDPC_1 public m_idObjDPC_2
public sub class_initialize() m_strName = "" m_cCreateTask = "0" m_cRealize = "0" m_idObjDPC_1 = 0 'no DP to perform m_idObjDPC_2 = 0 'no DP to perform m_cCollector = "0" end sub
public property get is_empty() is_empty = (m_cCreateTask = "0") and _ (m_cRealize = "0") and _ (m_cCollector = "0") and _ (m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(0)) and _ (m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(0)) end property
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, vbTab) 'db4 - OK if ubound(aItems) = 5 then m_strName = aItems(0) m_cCreateTask = left(aItems(1),1) m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(aItems(2)) m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(aItems(3)) m_cRealize = cstr(aItems(4)) m_cCollector = left(aItems(5),1) end if end sub
public function save_to_string save_to_string = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1"+vbTab+"%2"+vbTab+"%3"+vbTab+"%4"+vbTab+"%5"+vbTab+"%6") _ (m_strName)(cstr(m_cCreateTask))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_1))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_2))(cstr(m_cRealize))(cstr(m_cCollector)).done() end function
public sub show_config_page dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE")
pPage.topelement.title = "Konfiguracja operacji """ + m_strName + """"
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value = m_cCreateTask pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_REALIZE).value = m_cRealize pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR).value = m_cCollector 'todo: otwieranie i wybór
dim strPubType : strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_REALIZACJA_PRODUKCJI"
setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_1,m_idObjDPC_1,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_2,m_idObjDPC_2,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_1,abs(m_idObjDPC_1) setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_2,abs(m_idObjDPC_2) setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_1 setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_2
if pPage.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE then m_cCreateTask = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value m_idObjDPC_1 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW) m_idObjDPC_2 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW) m_cRealize = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_REALIZE).value m_cCollector = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR).value end if end sub public sub perform_operation(byref pObject , byref pPage) perform_operation_on_config Me, pObject , pPage end sub end class
class cn5realprod_dok_config private m_aOperations(COUNT_OPERATIONS_INX) public m_eTypRej
public function is_empty(byval nNumOper) dim pOperConf:set pOperConf = m_aOperations(nNumOper) is_empty = pOperConf.is_empty end function
public sub class_initialize() dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5realprod_oper_config next end sub
public sub init_with_defaults(nTypRej) dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5realprod_oper_config next m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk potwierdzenia" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 end sub
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR) dim i dim last : last = ubound(aItems) if last > COUNT_OPERATIONS then last = COUNT_OPERATIONS end if for i = 0 to last m_aOperations(i).load_from_string aItems(i) next end sub
public function save_to_string dim strTotal : strTotal = "" dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS strTotal = strTotal + m_aOperations(i).save_to_string() + REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR next save_to_string = strTotal end function
public property get operation_name(byval nOperNr) operation_name = m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName end property public property let operation_name(byval nOperNr,byref strName) m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName = strName end property
public sub show_config_page(byval nOperNr) m_aOperations(nOperNr).show_config_page end sub public sub perform_operation(nOperNr,byref pObject,byref pPage) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + cstr(operation_name(nOperNr)) #endif m_aOperations(nOperNr).perform_operation pObject , pPage end sub end class
function create_config_object(byref pRejestr) dim pNewConfig : set pNewConfig = new cn5realprod_dok_config pNewConfig.m_eTypRej = pRejestr.eTyp
set create_config_object = pNewConfig end function
'--------------------------- config page ------------------ function fok page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
'--------------------------- perform operation ------------------ private sub perform_operation_on_config(byref pConfig,byref pRealProd , byref pPage) if not make_task_on_realprod(pConfig.m_cCreateTask,pRealProd,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_realprod(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_1,pRealProd,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_realprod(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_2,pRealProd,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not realize_on_realprod(pConfig.m_cRealize,pRealProd,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not FillFromCollector(pConfig.m_cCollector,pRealProd,pPage) then exit sub end if
end sub
private function realize_on_realprod(cRealize , byref pRealProd,byref pPage):realize_on_realprod = true
if cRealize = "0" then exit function end if
dim pM60234 : set pM60234 = doc_.getmodule(60234)
dim pZUIDPA : set pZUIDPA = pM60234.new_zuidpa()
dim pConfigPage set pConfigPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_WIZARD_PAGE varDestPage=20603")
dim dblKrotnoscRecepty : dblKrotnoscRecepty = cdbl(1.0)
if (pConfigPage.getZuzycieParams(pZUIDPA)=CMD_CHOICE) then select case pZUIDPA.m_eMode case 1 dblKrotnoscRecepty = pZUIDPA.m_curIlosc case 2 if not pM60234.convert_il_wyrobu_na_krotnosc( _ pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec.idobj, pZUIDPA.opakowanie.idobj, _ pZUIDPA.m_curIlosc,pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta,dblKrotnoscRecepty) then exit function end if case 3 if not pM60234.convert_il_surowca_na_krotnosc( _ pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec.idobj, pZUIDPA.opakowanie.idobj, _ pZUIDPA.m_curIlosc,pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta,dblKrotnoscRecepty) then exit function end if case else exit function end select set pConfigPage = nothing
dim pDummy:set pDummy = nothing pM60234.fill_real_prod_poz_on_recepta pRealProd,pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta,dblKrotnoscRecepty , pDummy
end if
end function
private function make_task_on_realprod(cCreateTask,byref pRealProd,byref pPage) : make_task_on_realprod = true if cCreateTask = "0" then exit function end if
if pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_task_on_realprod = false end if end function
private function make_publication_on_realprod(idObjDPC,byref pRealProd,byref pPage) : make_publication_on_realprod = true
if idObjDPC = 0 then exit function end if
if not pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_publication_on_realprod = false exit function end if
make_publication_on_realprod = (realize_publication(abs(idObjDPC),pRealProd,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' wypełnia dokument magazynowy jeśli użytkownik wciśnie "wczytaj" ' albo wysyła bazę artykułów do kolektora '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function FillFromCollector(idObjDPC, byref pRealProd, byref pPage)
FillFromCollector = doc_.getmodule(60194).FillFromCollector(idObjDPC, pRealProd, pPage)
end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' dodaje pozycje do dokumentu magazynowego '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- sub DokmagAddPoz(byref pRealProd,byval pProdukt, byval lp ,byval ilosc,byval cena)
doc_.getmodule(60194).DokmagAddPoz pDokMag, pProdukt,lp , ilosc, cena
end sub '---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_ALL,Konfiguracja,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_1,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,1)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_2,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2) #comment NEXTVERSION - wywalic hide
QXC_LABEL(Zdarzenia,1)
zapamiętaj zdarzenie
QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_REALIZE,,wypełnij zużyciem idealnym) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR,,Kolektor danych)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
